query:
SELECT se.id AS stationEventId, se.businessDate, se.operatorUserId, u.name, u.username, se.productId, se.categoryId, se.subtypeCode, se.countForProductivity,
       p.batchNo, p.serialNumber, p.imei, p.productName, p.importedCategoryName, p.importedBrandName
FROM station_events se
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
LEFT JOIN products p ON p.id = se.productId
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = se.operatorUserId
WHERE se.stationCode = 'D'
  AND se.stationEventType = 'sampling_pass'
  AND se.countForProductivity = 1
  AND psd.id IS NULL
ORDER BY se.id DESC;

       p.batchNo, p.serialNumber, p.imei, p.productName, p.importedCategoryName, p.importedBrandName
FROM station_events se
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
LEFT JOIN products p ON p.id = se.productId
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = se.operatorUserId
WHERE se.stationCode = 'D'
  AND se.stationEventType = 'sampling_pass'
  AND se.countForProductivity = 1
  AND psd.id IS NULL
ORDER BY se.id DESC;
